direction: pass cached CalculateFlux side-normal trig values into boundary helpers
rationale: CalculateFluxKernel already loads sides.COSF[idx] and sides.SINF[idx] into COSJ and SINJ before boundary dispatch, but the KLAS 3 and KLAS 6 boundary helpers reload the same immutable side-normal values. Passing the cached values through BOUNDA removes redundant global reads on those boundary paths without changing arithmetic expression order.
